enabled.hint: Disable this to stop writing new QQ group events into the plugin database.

group_list_mode.hint: whitelist: only archive listed groups. blacklist: archive every QQ group except the listed ones.

group_list.hint: Each item can be a plain group id like 123456, a full unified session id like onebot:GroupMessage:123456, or platform_id:group_id.

save_raw_event.hint: Recommended. This keeps unsupported QQ segment types such as mface recoverable from the raw payload.

save_media_files.hint: When enabled, images, voice, video, and files are copied into the plugin media directory.

max_media_size_mb.description: Per-file media size limit in MB
max_media_size_mb.hint: Files larger than this limit are recorded as metadata only and will not be copied into plugin storage.

expand_forward_messages.description: Resolve forward message nodes with get_forward_msg
expand_forward_messages.hint: The outer forward segment is always archived. This option additionally fetches and stores the forwarded node contents when the OneBot implementation supports it.

record_all_notice_events.description: Record all QQ group notice events
record_all_notice_events.hint: If disabled, the plugin still records recalls and message emoji reactions because they are core archive events.

capture_outgoing_messages.description: Archive bot messages after they are sent
capture_outgoing_messages.hint: Outgoing messages are archived without a platform message id because AstrBot does not expose it at this hook point.

webui_enabled.hint: Starts a small local HTTP server for browsing archived groups, messages, notices, and raw payloads.

webui_host.hint: Use 127.0.0.1 for local-only access. Use 0.0.0.0 only when you really need remote access.

webui_port.hint: Port used by the archive WebUI.

webui_auth_token.hint: Optional bearer-like token for the WebUI API. When empty, the WebUI is open to whoever can reach the port.

profile_pipeline_enabled.hint: Builds message batches from archived group chats, runs a fixed judge/extract/resolve workflow, and writes claim/attribute tables back into archive.db.

profile_pipeline_mode.hint: heuristic uses built-in keyword and regex extraction to validate the LangGraph workflow. astrbot_llm uses AstrBot's native llm_generate interface with provider/model IDs from this plugin config. noop keeps the pipeline structure but does not emit claims.

profile_pipeline_poll_interval_sec.description: Profile pipeline poll interval in seconds
profile_pipeline_poll_interval_sec.hint: How often the background runner checks for new message batches and pending extraction jobs.

profile_pipeline_batch_message_limit.hint: Upper bound of incoming group messages bundled into one LangGraph block before judge/extract runs.

profile_pipeline_min_batch_messages.description: Minimum messages required to create a batch
profile_pipeline_min_batch_messages.hint: If a group has fewer than this many unseen incoming messages, the pipeline waits for more before creating a block.

profile_pipeline_batch_overlap.hint: Messages repeated between neighboring blocks so the judge can still see context that spans across long conversations.

profile_pipeline_max_jobs_per_tick.description: Maximum profile jobs per poll cycle
profile_pipeline_max_jobs_per_tick.hint: Controls how many LangGraph jobs the background runner executes in one polling round.

profile_pipeline_provider_id.hint: AstrBot provider ID used by all profile stages when a stage-specific provider ID is empty. Leave blank to fall back to AstrBot's current default chat provider.

profile_pipeline_model.hint: Optional default model name for all profile stages. Leave blank to use the provider's current model.

profile_pipeline_judge_provider_id.hint: Optional AstrBot provider ID for the batch judge stage.

profile_pipeline_judge_model.hint: Optional model name for the judge stage.

profile_pipeline_extract_provider_id.hint: Optional AstrBot provider ID for the structured claim extraction stage.

profile_pipeline_extract_model.hint: Optional model name for the extraction stage.

profile_pipeline_resolve_provider_id.hint: Optional AstrBot provider ID for the semantic dedupe and conflict-resolution stage.

profile_pipeline_resolve_model.hint: Optional model name for the resolver stage.

profile_pipeline_extract_include_images.description: Include archived images in extract stage
profile_pipeline_extract_include_images.hint: When enabled, the extraction stage sends stored or source image URLs to a multimodal model through AstrBot's llm_generate interface.

profile_pipeline_extract_max_images.hint: Upper bound of archived images attached to one extraction request.
